SEARCH
Package io.stimulustech.filequeue.util

Class ThreadUtil

java.lang.Object
io.stimulustech.filequeue.util.ThreadUtil
public class ThreadUtil extends Object
Thread and executor utility methods.

In Java 21 the Thread.Builder API replaces hand-written ThreadFactory implementations. getFlexibleThreadFactory and getGroupThreadFactory now delegate directly to Thread.ofPlatform().

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    DEFAULT_CORE_POOL_SIZE
    Default core pool size used when constructing executor services.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    checkInterrupt()
    Throws InterruptedException if the current thread's interrupt flag is set, clearing the flag in the process.
    static ThreadFactory
    getFlexibleThreadFactory(String name)
    Returns a ThreadFactory that creates named platform threads.
    static ThreadFactory
    getFlexibleThreadFactory(String name, boolean daemon)
    Returns a ThreadFactory that creates named platform threads with the specified daemon status.
    static ThreadFactory
    getGroupThreadFactory(ThreadGroup group, String threadName, boolean daemon)
    Returns a ThreadFactory that creates named platform threads belonging to the given ThreadGroup.
    static ExecutorService
    newFlexiThreadPool(int corePoolSize, int maximumPoolSize, ThreadFactory threadFactory)
    Creates a flexible thread pool where threads are created on demand up to maximumPoolSize and expire after 60 seconds of inactivity.
    static ExecutorService
    newFlexiThreadPool(int maximumPoolSize, ThreadFactory threadFactory)
    Creates a flexible thread pool with a single core thread and up to maximumPoolSize threads, using the supplied factory.
    static void
    shutdownAndAwaitTermination(ExecutorService pool, long timeout, TimeUnit timeUnit)
    Shuts down the given executor, waiting up to timeout for tasks to finish, then forcing a shutdown if tasks have not completed.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Field Details

    • DEFAULT_CORE_POOL_SIZE

      public static final int DEFAULT_CORE_POOL_SIZE
      Default core pool size used when constructing executor services.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Method Details

    • getFlexibleThreadFactory

      public static ThreadFactory getFlexibleThreadFactory(String name)
      Returns a ThreadFactory that creates named platform threads.
      Parameters:
      name - prefix used for thread names (a counter is appended)
      Returns:
      thread factory

    • getFlexibleThreadFactory

      public static ThreadFactory getFlexibleThreadFactory(String name, boolean daemon)
      Returns a ThreadFactory that creates named platform threads with the specified daemon status.
      Parameters:
      name - prefix used for thread names (a counter is appended)
      daemon - true if the created threads should be daemon threads
      Returns:
      thread factory

    • getGroupThreadFactory

      public static ThreadFactory getGroupThreadFactory(ThreadGroup group, String threadName, boolean daemon)
      Returns a ThreadFactory that creates named platform threads belonging to the given ThreadGroup.
      Parameters:
      group - thread group, or null to use the calling thread's group
      threadName - prefix for thread names (a counter is appended)
      daemon - true if the created threads should be daemon threads
      Returns:
      thread factory

    • shutdownAndAwaitTermination

      public static void shutdownAndAwaitTermination(ExecutorService pool, long timeout, TimeUnit timeUnit) throws InterruptedException
      Shuts down the given executor, waiting up to timeout for tasks to finish, then forcing a shutdown if tasks have not completed.
      Parameters:
      pool - executor to shut down
      timeout - maximum wait time
      timeUnit - unit for timeout
      Throws:
      InterruptedException - if the calling thread is interrupted while waiting

    • checkInterrupt

      public static void checkInterrupt() throws InterruptedException
      Throws InterruptedException if the current thread's interrupt flag is set, clearing the flag in the process.
      Throws:
      InterruptedException - if the current thread has been interrupted

    • newFlexiThreadPool

      public static ExecutorService newFlexiThreadPool(int corePoolSize, int maximumPoolSize, ThreadFactory threadFactory)
      Creates a flexible thread pool where threads are created on demand up to maximumPoolSize and expire after 60 seconds of inactivity.
      Parameters:
      corePoolSize - minimum number of threads to keep alive
      maximumPoolSize - maximum number of threads
      threadFactory - factory for new threads
      Returns:
      configured ExecutorService

    • newFlexiThreadPool

      public static ExecutorService newFlexiThreadPool(int maximumPoolSize, ThreadFactory threadFactory)
      Creates a flexible thread pool with a single core thread and up to maximumPoolSize threads, using the supplied factory.
      Parameters:
      maximumPoolSize - maximum number of threads
      threadFactory - factory for new threads
      Returns:
      configured ExecutorService
